eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Rice; Steele, MN; at 8:15 AM on APR 22, 2019 Effective until 9:15 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a Required Weekly Test of IPAWS from the Rice & Steele 9 1 1 Center. This is only a test.
